messages.content: Hey, I'm a software engineer at Stripe working on the payments team. Pretty intense quarter.
Sounds busy. What's your tech stack?
Mostly Go and a bit of Ruby. We use Postgres and Kafka.
Big update — I just started at Notion last week. Switched into product management. Stripe was great but I needed a change.
Congrats on the move! What drew you to PM?
Honestly, after 5 years of writing payments code I wanted to be closer to the user-facing side. Notion's product culture is a great fit.
Makes sense. Good luck in the new role!
